column1: Terms of Use
column2: Foydalanish shartlari

column1: Before using Jana, please review and accept the following terms:
column2: Jana'dan foydalanishdan oldin, quyidagi shartlarni o'qib chiqing va qabul qiling:

column1: Jana is an AI assistant. AI-generated responses may be inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated. You are responsible for verifying all information before acting on it.
column2: Jana AI yordamchisi. AI tomonidan yaratilgan javoblar noto'g'ri, to'liq emas yoki eskirgan bo'lishi mumkin. Har qanday ma'lumot asosida harakat qilishdan oldin uni tekshirish sizning mas'uliyatingiz.

column1: If you bring your own API keys (BYOK), you are responsible for all costs and usage with your LLM provider. Jana does not manage, limit, or monitor your provider billing.
column2: Agar o'z API kalitlaringiz (BYOK) ishlatayotgan bo'lsangiz, LLM provaydringiz bilan barcha xarajatlar va foydalanish uchun siz javobgarsiz. Jana provaydringiz hisob-kitobini boshqarmaydi, cheklamaydi yoki nazorat qilmaydi.

column1: Jana does not guarantee the accuracy, reliability, or suitability of AI responses for any particular purpose.
column2: Jana AI javoblarining aniq, ishonchli yoki har qanday maxsus maqsadga mos kelishini kafolatlamaydi.

column1: Your conversations are stored on this Frappe site. Data sent to cloud LLM providers is subject to their data handling policies.
column2: Suhbatlaringiz ushbu Frappe saytida saqlanadi. Bulutli LLM provayderlariga yuborilgan ma'lumotlar ularning ma'lumotlarni qayta ishlash siyosatlariga bo'ysunadi.

column1: Jana Community Edition is licensed under AGPL-3.0. See the full license for terms and conditions.
column2: Jana Community Edition AGPL-3.0 bo'yicha litsenziyalangan. Shartlar uchun to'liq litsenziyani ko'ring.
